description: Style Noteadidas catches the playful mood just right with these printed tees. Bright prints and a comfortable Fit gets the Sports-casual look back in vogue. You can pair this with cotton shorts or denims for a slick look.Product DetailsBlue T-shirt, has a round neckline, short sleeves and graphic print with branding in frontMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warmDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18”) is wearing a size M
